hints.text: Arctic archipelago under Norwegian sovereignty — **counts as Norway** in country streaks

hints.uniq_note: Mainland Norway uses white plates — black/yellow in an Arctic setting → Svalbard.

shared_with.note: Mainland Norwegian plates are long white with an EU strip.

hints.text: **Barren, treeless mountains**; vegetation = only moss & grasses; sky often overcast, gloomy coverage
hints.uniq_note: Iceland is the lookalike — Svalbard is even more barren, with zero trees and Arctic light.

shared_with.note: Iceland is also barren and treeless, with dark volcanic soil.
shared_with.diff: Zero vegetation at all + Arctic light → Svalbard; moss/grass patches + volcanic features (geothermal lakes) → Iceland.

hints.text: **Pyramiden**: feels abandoned — Soviet-style multi-storey blocks, no human activity, **pyramidal mountains** in the distance
**Barentsburg**: most desolate of the three towns; **multi-coloured apartment blocks** near the hilltop; even gloomier coverage

**Road spotlights**: SE of Longyearbyen = treeless mountains both sides + lakes to the mountains (small black mirror sometimes left); south of the airport = trekker holding a **red car** on a winding road (or the distinct NE mountain line)

bullets: Large ship → NW Spitsbergen NP (coverage gets darker toward the east)
Small red boat w/ men in red jackets → northwest
